# How to Add llms.txt in WordPress

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-07-26 13:49:44
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 963

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Last week, I quoted a study from Semrush that says AI search
traffic will surpass traditional search by the end of 2027.

Several of you asked me what the best way is to adapt to this new
search reality. Some of you also asked me how to get mentioned
and cited by Large Language Models (LLMs), like ChatGPT and
Gemini.

To optimize your content for AI-driven Search, I highly recommend
reading these guides:

- Generative Engine Optimization 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Bi6vO0TOF0bobAssO1ivCvgfgNkBzAU4kTlGsEj3KrQ )
: It's the process of optimizing your website's content to boost
its visibility in AI-driven search.

- Add llms.txt in WordPress 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.G9YwT_LyqwxMoZ-z189wsP-DPC-oY3vim8GxcM7OtRo )
: It helps AI engines discover the content on your site more
easily.

Read these articles and let me know your thoughts by replying to
this email :)

Streamline Your Content Creation with AI
----------------------------------------

Speaking of adapting to the AI-driven future, many of you are
probably wondering how to create more content efficiently while
maintaining quality and SEO optimization.

To further enhance your website content, AIOSEO recently launched
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..OWepsWH3BkXwg-Dy6GMC4OcxMWA2mqIDUYc7HEJ6l3A ) their AI Content Generator.

It helps you automatically generate:

-  FAQ blocks with schema markup
-  Key points for better readability
-  Optimized SEO titles and meta descriptions
-  Tailored social media posts for multiple platforms

You can generate automated content all from within your WordPress
dashboard! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..OWepsWH3BkXwg-Dy6GMC4OcxMWA2mqIDUYc7HEJ6l3A )

Instead of juggling multiple platforms, you can now generate and
implement optimized content elements with just a few clicks.

Have a great rest of the week!

Cheers,
Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
